module.name: no-empty-catch
module.description: Disallow empty catch blocks that silently swallow errors.

scenarios.name: should allow a catch block that re-throws the error
scenarios.given: a try-catch where the catch rethrows the error

scenarios.name: should allow a catch block that logs the error
scenarios.given: a try-catch where the catch body calls console.error(e)

scenarios.name: should report a completely empty catch block
scenarios.given: a try-catch where the catch body is an empty block {}
scenarios.then: a noEmptyCatch violation is reported on the catch clause
